ORAL AND DOC EVIDENCE PRESENTED. CASE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF PLTF AS PER PRAYER. PLTF TO PREPARE JDGMENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, PETE MORALES, RODGER RAFAEL $9,116.44 PRINCIPAL, $3,082.42 INTEREST, $671.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,870.68
